title: Dice Game Rules
entries: {pick:The rules are simple, on each turn the player|Play is quick — each turn, a player|The rules are simple: on their turn, a player} rolls once. {pick:To win, they must|To take the game, they must|To claim victory, one must} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-winner} The highest roll is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-worst}.

{pick:The rules are simple, on each turn the player|Play is quick — each turn, a player|The rules are simple: on their turn, a player} rolls twice, keeping the better results. {pick:To win, they must|To take the game, they must|To claim victory, one must} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-winner} The highest roll is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-worst}.

{pick:The rules are simple, on each turn the player|Play is quick — each turn, a player|The rules are simple: on their turn, a player} rolls once or twice, keeping the second result on a reroll. {pick:To win, they must|To take the game, they must|To claim victory, one must} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-winner} The highest roll is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-worst}.

{pick:The rules are simple, on each turn the player|Play is quick — each turn, a player|The rules are simple: on their turn, a player} rolls at the same time as other players. {pick:To win, they must|To take the game, they must|To claim victory, one must} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-winner} The highest roll is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-worst}.

{pick:The rules are simple, on each turn the player|Play is quick — each turn, a player|The rules are simple: on their turn, a player} rolls and hides the results from other players. {pick:To win, they must|To take the game, they must|To claim victory, one must} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-winner} The highest roll is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-worst}.

{pick:The rules are simple, on each turn the player|Play is quick — each turn, a player|The rules are simple: on their turn, a player} rolls and hides the results from him- or herself and from other players. {pick:To win, they must|To take the game, they must|To claim victory, one must} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-winner} The highest roll is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-worst}.

{pick:The rules are simple, on each turn the player|Play is quick — each turn, a player|The rules are simple: on their turn, a player} rolls and hides the results from him- or herself but not from the other players. {pick:To win, they must|To take the game, they must|To claim victory, one must} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-winner} The highest roll is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-worst}.

{pick:The rules are simple, on each turn the player|Play is quick — each turn, a player|The rules are simple: on their turn, a player} rolls and waits for an arbiter to make a ruling. {pick:To win, they must|To take the game, they must|To claim victory, one must} {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-winner} The highest roll is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-best}, and the worst is called {table:gm/tavern/game-dice-worst}.
